title: Dust in the Average Galaxy: Attenuation, Emission, and Opacity from 0<z<7
comment: 50 pages, 21 figures; submitted to OJA. Table 1 provides measured empirical relations. Data tables available at https://github.com/caitlinmcasey/duststacks
summary: We present constraints on the dust emission and attenuation properties of galaxies across 0<z<7 using JWST imaging from the COSMOS-Web Survey combined with deep FIR/(sub)millimeter data from Spitzer, Herschel, SCUBA-2, NIKA-2 and ALMA. We analyze over 500,000 galaxies to independently constrain attenuation in the rest-frame UV/optical as well as dust emission from stacked FIR SEDs, enabling a direct comparison between the two. We find UV/optical attenuation systematically underpredicts IR luminosity by a factor of ~3x at 0.5<z<7 and up to an order of magnitude for $M_\star>10^{10.5}M_\odot$. We derive empirical relationships for the effective attenuation, dust temperature, fraction of star formation that is unobscured, and dust-to-stellar mass ratio as functions of redshift and stellar mass. We separate the first order effect of star/dust geometry from dust grain properties by combining constraints on the IR SED, UV SED, and dust mass surface density. Importantly, we measure over an order of magnitude decrease in $κ_{UV}/κ_{FIR}$--the ratio of dust mass absorption coefficients in the UV at 1600Å and FIR at 500$μ$m--from z~0 to z~7. A depressed $κ_{UV}/κ_{FIR}$ is consistent with a deficit of small dust grains, possibly attributable to the intense radiation fields of high-$z$ star formation; indeed, we find a redshift-invariant inverse relationship between $κ_{UV}/κ_{FIR}$ and $Σ_{SFR}$. Most evolution in the dust-to-stellar ratio is at $z<1$, the product of mild downward evolution in the dust-to-gas ratio combined with steep evolution in the gas-to-stellar ratio. The significant evolution and dynamic range of $κ_{UV}/κ_{FIR}$ and prevailing disconnect between the UV/optical and FIR regimes emphasize that direct dust constraints are irreplaceable for the majority of star-forming galaxies at z<7, not just the most extreme star-formers.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST COSMOS-Web巡天结合多波段远红外/亚毫米数据，分析了超过50万个星系在0<z<7范围内的尘埃发射与消光特性。发现紫外/光学消光系统性地低估了红外光度约3倍（0.5<z<7），对大质量星系（M>10^10.5 M⊙）偏差可达一个数量级。测量到紫外与远红外尘埃吸收系数比（κ_UV/κ_FIR）从z~0到z~7下降了一个数量级以上，表明高红移星系中小尘埃颗粒缺失，可能与高恒星形成面密度产生的强烈辐射场有关。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对星系尘埃特性的理解主要依赖紫外/光学消光，但这种方法可能系统性地低估尘埃对星系能量的影响，尤其是在高红移和大质量星系中。需要利用JWST等直接远红外观测来独立约束尘埃发射与消光的关系。
AI.method: 分析JWST COSMOS-Web巡天中超过50万个星系的数据，结合Spitzer、Herschel、SCUBA-2、NIKA-2和ALMA的远红外/亚毫米数据。通过堆叠分析独立约束星系在静止系紫外/光学的消光特性以及远红外尘埃发射，直接比较两者结果。利用红外SED、紫外SED和尘埃质量面密度联合约束，分离恒星/尘埃几何效应与尘埃颗粒性质。
AI.result: 紫外/光学消光系统性地低估红外光度约3倍（0.5<z<7），对大质量星系偏差达一个数量级。κ_UV/κ_FIR从z~0到z~7下降超过一个数量级，且与恒星形成面密度（Σ_SFR）存在红移不变的逆相关关系。尘埃与恒星质量比的大部分演化发生在z<1。
AI.conclusion: 高红移星系中κ_UV/κ_FIR的显著降低表明小尘埃颗粒的缺失，可能由强烈的恒星形成辐射场导致。直接尘埃约束对于z<7的大多数恒星形成星系是不可替代的，而不仅仅针对极端恒星形成天体。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用JWST的COSMOS-Web巡天成像数据，结合Spitzer、Herschel、SCUBA-2、NIKA-2和ALMA的远红外/亚毫米数据，给出了0<z<7范围内星系的尘埃辐射和消光特性约束。我们分析了超过50万个星系，独立约束了静止系紫外/光学消光以及通过叠加远红外能谱分布得到的尘埃辐射，从而能够直接比较两者。我们发现，在0.5<z<7范围内，紫外/光学消光系统性地低估了红外光度约3倍，对于M_⋆>10^10.5 M_⊙的星系，低估可达一个数量级。我们推导了有效消光、尘埃温度、未被遮蔽的恒星形成比例以及尘埃-恒星质量比随红移和恒星质量变化的经验关系。通过结合红外能谱分布、紫外能谱分布和尘埃质量面密度的约束，我们将恒星/尘埃几何结构的一阶效应与尘埃颗粒性质分离开来。重要的是，我们测量到κ_UV/κ_FIR（1600Å紫外和500μm远红外处的尘埃质量吸收系数之比）从z~0到z~7下降了一个数量级以上。κ_UV/κ_FIR的降低与小尘埃颗粒的缺失一致，这可能归因于高红移恒星形成的强辐射场；事实上，我们发现κ_UV/κ_FIR与Σ_SFR之间存在红移不变的负相关关系。尘埃-恒星比的大部分演化发生在z<1，这是尘埃-气体比温和下降与气体-恒星比急剧演变的共同结果。κ_UV/κ_FIR的显著演化和动态范围，以及紫外/光学与远红外区域之间的普遍脱节，表明直接尘埃约束对于z<7的大多数恒星形成星系（而不仅仅是最极端的恒星形成天体）是不可替代的。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：高红移星系中κ_UV/κ_FIR的显著降低表明小尘埃颗粒的缺失，可能由强烈的恒星形成辐射场导致。直接尘埃约束对于z<7的大多数恒星形成星系是不可替代的，而不仅仅针对极端恒星形成天体。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The distribution of the stackable 501,656 sources from the COSMOS field used in this work. Contours indicate concentrations of sources exceeding \(>\) 5 per unit \(\Delta z=0.05\) and \(\Delta\log(M)=0.05\) (contours mark densities of 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, … sources per same binning). The bins used for stacking are shown with green and orange gridlines, every \(\Delta z=0.5\) in redshift and \(\Delta\log(M_{\star}/M_{\odot})=0.25\) . Bins with converged dust SEDs (constraints for both dust emission and attenuation) are outlined in orange while bins with binned attenuation characteristics only (no derived dust emission) are shown in green.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本工作中使用的来自COSMOS天区的501,656个可叠加源的分布。等高线表示每单位Δz=0.05和Δlog(M)=0.05内超过>5个源的集中区域（等高线标记密度为5、10、20、50、100……个源/相同分箱）。用于叠加的分箱以绿色和橙色网格线显示，红移间隔Δz=0.5，恒星质量间隔Δlog(M_⋆/M_⊙)=0.25。具有收敛尘埃能谱分布（同时约束尘埃发射和消光）的分箱以橙色标出，而仅具有分箱消光特征（未推导尘埃发射）的分箱以绿色显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The best-fit dust SEDs to stacked (sub)millimeter photometry for stellar mass and redshift selected samples. Each panel shows a schematic of the dust SED (blue, with light blue SEDs sampling the uncertainty) superimposed on the stacked photometry (black with gray error bars). Panels with gray backgrounds have photometric constraints of too poor quality to fit a converged dust SED (fewer than two points above 3 \(\sigma\) significance). The numbers in the upper left of each panel indicate the number of sources stacked across (1) Spitzer, Herschel and SCUBA-2, (2) NIKA-2, (3) CHAMPS, and (4) ExMORA (the latter three cover smaller areas than the full field). Inset to the top right is one example panel in finer detail to show the wavelength and flux density axis, which is fixed for every subpanel.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：针对恒星质量和红移选定样本，对叠加的（亚）毫米测光数据的最佳拟合尘埃能谱分布。每个面板显示了尘埃能谱分布的示意图（蓝色，浅蓝色能谱分布表示不确定性范围），叠加在测光数据上（黑色，灰色误差棒）。灰色背景的面板表示测光约束质量太差，无法拟合收敛的尘埃能谱分布（少于两个点高于3σ显著性）。每个面板左上角的数字表示叠加的源数量，分别来自（1）Spitzer、Herschel和SCUBA-2，（2）NIKA-2，（3）CHAMPS和（4）ExMORA（后三个覆盖的面积小于整个天区）。右上角插入了一个示例面板的细节，以显示波长和流量密度轴，每个子面板的轴是固定的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: A comparison of derived properties from LePhare (Shuntov et al. , 2025 ) and our bagpipes -derived quantities based on the same model-based photometry. At left, LePhare photometric redshifts and their uncertainties were used as input to bagpipes ; the resulting agreement is tight with \(\sigma_{\Delta z/(1+z)}=0.04\) . Middle, the stellar masses agree within uncertainties. At right, the derived A V from bagpipes agrees with the (quantized) values of A V inferred from more rigid LePhare SED fits; for visual clarity, we have perturbed LePhare A V values about their fixed values to show the breadth of the underlying population.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：来自LePhare（Shuntov等人，2025）的推导属性与基于相同模型测光的bagpipes推导量的比较。左侧，LePhare的光度红移及其不确定性被用作bagpipes的输入；结果一致性很好，σ_Δz/(1+z)=0.04。中间，恒星质量在不确定性范围内一致。右侧，从bagpipes推导的A_V与从更严格的LePhare能谱分布拟合推断的（量化）A_V值一致；为清晰起见，我们扰动了LePhare的A_V值（围绕其固定值）以显示底层分布的广度。

At \(z\sim 0\) we compare to Garn and Best ( 2010 ) and Salim et al. ( 2016 ) ; while aligned at low masses, we find higher A UV around 10 10.5 M ⋆ (albeit we are only presenting binned A UV for the star-forming subset and not the quiescent systems). Across all masses, we generally see a decrease in the average A UV (A V ) with redshift to \(z\sim 6\) ; at higher redshifts, there is then an increase. figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们在0<z<8范围内的质量和红移分箱的A_UV-M_⋆关系（左）和A_V-M_⋆关系（右）。注意图4中z<3.5的分箱与此处相同。阴影区域是每个分箱区间的68%置信区间。仅显示包含超过50个源的分箱。我们看到A_UV-M_⋆（A_V-M_⋆）关系随红移有轻微演化，这在左上和右上面板中三个固定质量分箱（覆盖我们数据的整个范围）中更为清晰。在所有质量上，我们通常看到平均A_UV（A_V）随红移增加到z~6时下降；在更高红移处，则出现增加。这个拐点与再电离结束的时间一致，但其起源需要进一步研究。附录中的两个图（图22和23）更详细地展示了该关系与我们拟合关系（方程11）的分解。

The SMC attenuation curve roughly follows \(\delta\) =-0.4, which is consistent with the average attenuation curve recovered by Salim et al. ( 2018 , red square) and Conroy et al. ( 2010 , dark red square) . Higher- \(z\) literature measurements come from Buat et al. ( 2012 ) (yellow square), Kriek and Conroy ( 2013 , pink square) and Reddy et al. ( 2016 , orange square) . We show the evolution of \(\delta\) binned by stellar mass ( \(\Delta\log M=0.25\) bins) with colored points and stars, and the average \(\delta\) across all masses as open black circles between \(2 12 .

Dashed lines at left denote the total IR luminosity that would be expected if 100% of star-formation were obscured, and the SFR is taken from the main-sequence of star formation, or the M ⋆ -SFR relation (Speagle et al. , 2014 ) . Between \(0 IR and 5-10 \(\times\) increase in M dust per mass bin above \(10^{10}\) M ⊙ . Beyond \(z\sim 2\) , evolution is more subtle; at high M ⋆ , there is a factor of 10 \(\times\) higher L IR at \(z\sim 6\) than at \(z\sim 2\) , while masses below \(10^{10.5}\) M ⊙ see no evolution or a dropoff in L IR . Dust masses in the highest mass galaxies show no evolution, while there is mild evidence suggesting a threefold increase in dust masses for intermediate masses.

title: An extreme ram-pressure stripping event in a protocluster at redshift 4.3
comment: 3 main figures, 9 Extended Data figures, and 4 Extended Data tables; 42 pages total
summary: In the nearby Universe, the environment plays a crucial role in suppressing star formation in dense regions. In particular, ram-pressure stripping (RPS) is a major mechanism for removing gas from galaxies in clusters, occurring when galaxies travel through a dense hot atmosphere and leave trailing gaseous wakes. By depleting the cold gas reservoir, RPS can drive outside-in quenching and is therefore thought to be an important route for transforming cluster galaxies. At earlier times, however, protoclusters are dynamically young and their hot atmospheres are expected to be immature, so environmental effects are commonly assumed to be dominated by gravitational interactions rather than hydrodynamic stripping. Recent observations have begun to show that RPS can already operate before mature cluster assembly, including extended gas tails in a forming cluster at $z=2.51$ and in a galaxy group at $z=3.06$. These studies demonstrate that hydrodynamic stripping is possible at earlier times, but whether RPS can become sufficient enough to quench massive galaxies at $z>2$ remains unclear. Here we report ALMA and JWST observations of SPT2349$-$56-C26, a massive galaxy experiencing an extreme RPS event in the SPT2349$-$56 protocluster at $z=4.30$. C26 appears to exhibit a particularly severe active-stripping phase: the displaced gas contains more than half of the observed cold-gas reservoir, with the gas-emission peak showing a large 6-kpc offset from the stellar body. These observations show that RPS can remove most of the cold gas from massive galaxies in dense protocluster cores as early as $z=4.3$, providing a direct hydrodynamic pathway for environmental quenching at $z>4$.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA和JWST观测，在红移4.30的SPT2349-56原星系团中，发现一个大质量星系C26正经历极端的冲压剥离事件，超过一半的冷气体被剥离，表明在宇宙早期（z>4）环境淬灭已可通过流体动力学机制发生。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在近邻宇宙中，环境在抑制致密区域恒星形成方面起着关键作用。特别是，冲压剥离（RPS）是星系在星系团中运动时穿过致密热大气并留下尾随气体尾迹的主要气体移除机制。通过消耗冷气体储库，RPS可以驱动由外向内淬灭，因此被认为是转变星系团星系的重要途径。然而，在更早的时期，原星系团在动力学上尚不成熟，其热大气预计也不发达，因此环境效应通常被认为以引力相互作用为主，而非流体动力学剥离。最近的观测开始表明，RPS在成熟的星系团形成之前就可以运作，包括在红移2.51的一个形成中星系团和红移3.06的一个星系群中观测到的延伸气体尾迹。这些研究证明流体动力学剥离在更早时期是可能的，但RPS是否足以在红移大于2时淬灭大质量星系仍不清楚。在此，我们报告ALMA和JWST对SPT2349−56原星系团中红移4.30处经历极端RPS事件的大质量星系SPT2349−56-C26的观测。C26似乎表现出一个特别严重的主动剥离阶段：被置换的气体包含超过一半的观测到的冷气体储库，气体发射峰值与恒星主体存在6千秒差距的大偏移。这些观测表明，RPS最早可以在红移4.3时从致密原星系团核心的大质量星系中移除大部分冷气体，为红移大于4时的环境淬灭提供了直接的流体动力学途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 冲压剥离在红移4.3的致密原星系团核心中即可移除大质量星系的大部分冷气体，提供了在z>4时期通过流体动力学途径实现环境淬灭的直接证据，将冲压剥离的有效时间推前至宇宙更早期。

title: PAHSPECS: Spatially Resolved PAH Spectroscopy at cosmic noon with JWST MIRI MRS
summary: We present spatially resolved spectroscopy with JWST/MIRI MRS of a representative sample of normal star-forming galaxies at $z\sim1.1$ as part of the PAHSPECS program. To extract emission from Polycyclic Aromatic Hydrocarbon (PAH) features, we forward model the data cubes with non-parametric spatial distributions, accounting for convolution with the PSF. With this method we are able to recover accurate spatial profiles of the 3.3 $μ$m, 6.2 $μ$m, 7.7 $μ$m, 11.3 $μ$m PAHs and [ArII] (6.98 $μ$m) emission and produce PAH ratio maps at cosmic noon. From the PAH ratio maps we find that PAHs become larger and more neutral with increasing galactocentric radius, which is the opposite of trends in local galaxies, indicating radial ISM gradients in normal star-forming galaxies are different at cosmic noon. Through spatially resolved SED fitting of HST and JWST photometry we measure the UV radiation field hardness through the intrinsic ratio of UV to optical flux and find the 3.3/11.3 PAH ratio to decrease with increasing hardness and the 11.3/7.7 to increase. This may suggest photo-destruction of small/ionized PAHs is driving the observed PAH ratio trends and may explain the overall lower 3.3/11.3 PAH at cosmic noon compared to the local universe. This work demonstrates that PAH properties hold crucial information on the resolved ISM physics of galaxies at cosmic noon.

AI.tldr: 该论文利用JWST/MIRI MRS对z~1.1的正常恒星形成星系进行空间分辨光谱分析，发现PAH分子在宇宙正午时期随星系半径增大而变得更大型和中性，与局域星系趋势相反，表明宇宙正午的ISM径向梯度与局域不同。
AI.motivation: 理解宇宙正午时期（z~1.1）正常恒星形成星系中PAH分子的空间分布特征及其与辐射环境的关联，揭示该时期星际介质（ISM）的物理特性。
AI.method: 使用JWST/MIRI MRS获取空间分辨光谱，通过前向建模数据立方体（非参数空间分布，考虑PSF卷积）提取PAH特征发射，并结合HST和JWST测光进行空间分辨SED拟合。
AI.result: 发现PAH随星系半径增大变得更大型和中性（与局域星系相反）；3.3/11.3 PAH比值随紫外辐射硬度增加而降低，11.3/7.7则增加；宇宙正午的3.3/11.3 PAH比值低于局域宇宙。
AI.conclusion: PAH特性蕴含星系ISM物理的关键信息，小/电离PAH的光致破坏可能是驱动PAH比值变化的主要原因，宇宙正午正常星系与局域星系存在不同的ISM径向梯度。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用JWST/MIRI MRS对PAHSPECS项目中一个代表性的正常恒星形成星系样本（红移z~1.1）进行了空间分辨光谱观测。为了提取多环芳烃（PAH）特征的发射，我们采用非参数空间分布对数据立方体进行前向建模，并考虑了点扩散函数的卷积。通过这种方法，我们成功恢复了3.3微米、6.2微米、7.7微米、11.3微米PAH以及[ArII]（6.98微米）发射的精确空间轮廓，并生成了宇宙正午时期的PAH比值图。从PAH比值图中我们发现，随着星系中心距离的增加，PAH变得更大且更中性，这与局域星系的趋势相反，表明宇宙正午时期正常恒星形成星系的星际介质径向梯度有所不同。通过对HST和JWST测光数据进行空间分辨的SED拟合，我们通过紫外与光学流量的本征比值测量了紫外辐射场的硬度，发现3.3/11.3 PAH比值随硬度增加而降低，而11.3/7.7 PAH比值则增加。这可能表明小/电离PAH的光致破坏是驱动观测到的PAH比值变化的原因，并可能解释宇宙正午时期3.3/11.3 PAH比值整体低于局域宇宙的现象。这项工作表明，PAH特性蕴含了宇宙正午星系星际介质物理的关键信息。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：PAH特性蕴含星系ISM物理的关键信息，小/电离PAH的光致破坏可能是驱动PAH比值变化的主要原因，宇宙正午正常星系与局域星系存在不同的ISM径向梯度。

title: PAHSPECS: Polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbon properties at cosmic noon with JWST/MIRI MRS
comment: Submitted to Astronomy & Astrophysics; 15 pages, 14 figures
summary: Context. Cosmic noon (z ~ 1-3) marks the peak of the cosmic star-formation rate density, when dust-obscured star formation dominated galaxy growth. Mid-infrared spectroscopy probes the interstellar medium through PAH emission, whose band ratios trace PAH charge, size, and local radiation-field conditions. Aims. We characterize the PAH properties of five z ~ 1.1 star-forming galaxies from the PAHSPECS survey and investigate how their PAH luminosities and band ratios relate to global galaxy properties. We compare them with local luminous infrared galaxies (LIRGs) to assess whether PAH emission at cosmic noon differs from that nearby. Methods. We analyze JWST/MIRI MRS observations of five ASPECS galaxies in the HUDF. Integrated spectra are extracted with wavelength-dependent apertures and modeled with CAFE, including ancillary photometry to constrain the dust emission. Stellar masses and SFRs are derived with Prospector. Results. Compared to local LIRGs, most PAHSPECS sources show higher 6.2/7.7 and lower 11.3/7.7 ratios, suggesting an ionized PAH component weighted toward smaller grains. The 3.3/11.3 ratio is less constrained, since the 3.3 micron feature is detected in only two sources. Within the sample, 11.3/7.7 increases with sSFR and star-formation surface density, while 6.2/7.7 decreases with sSFR, consistent with preferential processing of small ionized PAH carriers. ASPECS-15, the AGN-hosting source, has the lowest 6.2/7.7 ratio and highest sSFR, suggesting a reduced contribution from small PAHs, potentially due to AGN activity. The 7.7 micron luminosity follows the local L7.7-SFR relation, supporting its use as a star-formation tracer at z ~ 1. Conclusions. PAH emission at cosmic noon appears shaped by different ISM conditions than in nearby starburst galaxies, likely reflecting more intense radiation fields, while the 7.7 micron feature remains a robust SFR tracer.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST/MIRI MRS数据分析了5个z~1.1恒星形成星系的PAH发射特性，发现相比本地LIRGs，这些宇宙正午星系的PAH波段比率（更高的6.2/7.7、更低的11.3/7.7）表明其星际介质受到更强的辐射场影响，电离PAH成分偏向更小颗粒；同时7.7微米光度仍是可靠的恒星形成率示踪剂。
AI.motivation: 宇宙正午（z~1-3）是恒星形成率密度峰值时期，尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成主导星系增长。通过中红外光谱中的PAH发射特征，可以探测星际介质条件，并评估宇宙正午与本地星系的PAH特性是否存在差异。
AI.method: 对5个ASPECS星系的JWST/MIRI MRS观测数据，采用波长相关孔径提取积分光谱，使用CAFE模型拟合（辅以测光数据约束尘埃发射），并通过Prospector推导恒星质量和恒星形成率。
AI.result: PAHSPECS源相比本地LIRGs表现出更高的6.2/7.7比和更低的11.3/7.7比，指示电离PAH成分偏向更小颗粒；11.3/7.7随sSFR和恒星形成面密度增加，6.2/7.7随sSFR降低；含AGN的源ASPECS-15具有最低6.2/7.7比和最高sSFR；7.7微米光度符合本地L7.7-SFR关系。
AI.conclusion: 宇宙正午的PAH发射与本地星暴星系受不同ISM条件塑造，反映更强的辐射场环境，但7.7微米特征仍是z~1处可靠的恒星形成率示踪剂。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 背景：宇宙正午（z ~ 1-3）标志着宇宙恒星形成率密度的峰值，此时尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成主导了星系的增长。中红外光谱通过多环芳烃（PAH）发射探测星际介质，其波段比值可示踪PAH的电荷、大小和局部辐射场条件。目的：我们表征了PAHSPECS巡天中五个z ~ 1.1恒星形成星系的PAH性质，并研究了其PAH光度和波段比值与整体星系性质的关系。我们将其与本地发光红外星系（LIRGs）进行比较，以评估宇宙正午的PAH发射是否与近邻星系不同。方法：我们分析了哈勃超深空（HUDF）中五个ASPECS星系的JWST/MIRI MRS观测数据。使用波长相关孔径提取积分光谱，并通过CAFE模型进行拟合，同时结合辅助测光数据约束尘埃发射。恒星质量和恒星形成率（SFR）通过Prospector推导得出。结果：与本地LIRGs相比，大多数PAHSPECS源显示出更高的6.2/7.7比值和更低的11.3/7.7比值，表明存在偏向较小颗粒的电离PAH成分。3.3/11.3比值约束较弱，因为仅在两个源中探测到3.3微米特征。在样本内，11.3/7.7比值随比恒星形成率（sSFR）和恒星形成面密度增加而增加，而6.2/7.7比值随sSFR增加而减小，这与小电离PAH载体的优先处理一致。包含活动星系核（AGN）的源ASPECS-15具有最低的6.2/7.7比值和最高的sSFR，表明小PAH的贡献减少，可能源于AGN活动。7.7微米光度遵循本地L7.7-SFR关系，支持其作为z ~ 1处恒星形成示踪剂的有效性。结论：宇宙正午的PAH发射受不同于本地星暴星系的星际介质条件塑造，可能反映了更强的辐射场，而7.7微米特征仍是可靠的SFR示踪剂。

title: MEGA and SMILES Find Fewer Dusty Galaxies than Expected at Cosmic Noon
summary: We present infrared (IR) luminsosity functions (LFs) and resulting star formation rate densities using the JWST Mid-infrared Instrument (MIRI) observations from the MIRI EGS Galaxy and AGN (MEGA) survey and Systematic MIRI Legacy Extragalactic Survey (SMILES). JWST allows us to perform a robust analysis on the faint end of the IR LF beyond the local universe. We directly measure the 7.7$μ$m polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbon (PAH) feature using either F1000W, F1500W, or F2100W photometry. This results in a sample of 634 galaxies across the two surveys covering an area of 105 arcmin$^2$ ($\sim$70 in the EGS and $\sim35$ in the GOODS-S/HUDF fields) and spanning $0.2<z<2$. We convert the 7.7$μ$m PAH luminosity to total IR luminosity, resulting in LFs that are two orders of magnitude fainter than previous studies. In contrast to previous extrapolations based on shallower observations, we find a strong flattening in the faint end of the LF with an average slope of $α\sim0.147$. This indicates that less luminous galaxies do not have as much dust obscured star formation as predicted. We measure the star formation rate density (SFRD) by integrating our new IR LFs and find a slightly lower SFRD in all redshift bins than previous studies made with ALMA, Herschel, and Spitzer. We also measure the contribution to the SFRD as a function of luminosity and confirm that LIRGs and ULIRGs remain the dominant contributors to the dust-obscured star formation at $z\sim1-2$.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用JWST MIRI观测数据，直接测量7.7μm PAH特征，构建了红移0.2<z<2范围内的红外光度函数，发现其暗端比以往研究暗淡两个数量级且呈现明显平缓化（α~0.147），表明低光度星系的尘埃遮蔽恒星形成低于预期。积分得到的恒星形成率密度略低于ALMA、Herschel和Spitzer的结果，并确认LIRGs和ULIRGs在z~1-2仍是尘埃遮蔽恒星形成的主要贡献者。
AI.motivation: 利用JWST MIRI的高灵敏度，超越局部宇宙，对红外光度函数的暗端进行鲁棒分析，以更准确地理解低光度星系的尘埃遮蔽恒星形成活动。
AI.method: 使用JWST MIRI的MEGA和SMILES巡天数据，通过F1000W、F1500W或F2100W测光直接测量7.7μm PAH特征，将PAH光度转换为总红外光度，构建红外光度函数并积分得到恒星形成率密度。
AI.result: 获得634个星系样本；LF暗端比以往研究暗淡两个数量级，且呈现强烈平缓化（α~0.147）；积分得到的SFRD略低于ALMA、Herschel和Spitzer的结果；LIRGs和ULIRGs在z~1-2仍是尘埃遮蔽恒星形成的主要贡献者。
AI.conclusion: 低光度星系的尘埃遮蔽恒星形成低于以往预测，JWST的更高灵敏度揭示了更精确的红外光度函数形态。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用JWST中红外仪器（MIRI）在MIRI EGS星系和活动星系核（MEGA）巡天以及系统MIRI传统河外巡天（SMILES）中的观测数据，展示了红外（IR）光度函数（LFs）及由此得出的恒星形成率密度。JWST使我们能够在局部宇宙之外对红外光度函数的暗端进行稳健分析。我们使用F1000W、F1500W或F2100W测光直接测量7.7微米多环芳烃（PAH）特征。这得到了两个巡天中覆盖105平方角分（EGS约70平方角分，GOODS-S/HUDF天区约35平方角分）且红移范围0.2<z<2的634个星系样本。我们将7.7微米PAH光度转换为总红外光度，得到的光度函数比以往研究暗两个数量级。与基于较浅观测的先前外推相反，我们发现光度函数暗端存在强烈平坦化，平均斜率α~0.147。这表明较低光度星系的尘埃遮蔽恒星形成低于预测。我们通过积分新的红外光度函数测量了恒星形成率密度（SFRD），发现在所有红移区间内，SFRD略低于先前使用ALMA、赫歇尔和斯皮策望远镜的研究。我们还测量了SFRD随光度的贡献，并确认亮红外星系（LIRGs）和超亮红外星系（ULIRGs）在z~1-2时仍是尘埃遮蔽恒星形成的主要贡献者。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：低光度星系的尘埃遮蔽恒星形成低于以往预测，JWST的更高灵敏度揭示了更精确的红外光度函数形态。

图5：使用F770W、F1000W、F1500W和F2100W测光得出的四个红移区间的单色光度函数。计算星系的L_ν后，乘以每个滤光片的中心波长得到νL_ν。MEGA观测以实线连接的点显示，SMILES观测以虚线连接的方块显示。两个巡天在每个红移区间具有可比的光度函数，微小差异可能归因于宇宙方差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: IR LFs for five redshift ranges. Previous works using observations from Herschel are shown in purple, Spitzer in pale yellow, and ALMA in blue. The fits to the observations uses a double power-law form whose parameters are given in Section 4.1. The evolution of the LF is shown in the bottom right panel.

title: Weak-lensing mass calibration of \emph{Planck} Sunyaev--Zel'dovich clusters with HSC-SSP Year~3
summary: We present a weak gravitational lensing mass calibration of 19 \textit{Planck} Sunyaev--Zel'dovich (SZ) selected galaxy clusters using shape measurements from the Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru Strategic Program (HSC-SSP) Year 3 shape catalog. We measure the stacked weak-lensing signal $ΔΣ(R)$ using per-cluster lensing weights that match the measurement pipeline's stacking scheme, and construct an analytical covariance matrix that includes shape noise and projected large-scale structure contributions. Our primary constraint on the SZ mass bias comes from a forward-modeling approach that integrates over the halo mass function while accounting for the \textit{Planck} SZ selection function, Eddington bias from log-normal scatter in the SZ mass proxy, and cluster miscentering. Fitting four free parameters, the log mass bias $\ln(1-b)$, the miscentered fraction $f_{\rm mis}$, the offset scale $σ_{\rm off}$, and the SZ scatter $σ_{\ln M}$, over the radial range $0.5$--$5.0\,h^{-1}\,\mathrm{Mpc}$, we obtain $1-b = 0.73^{+0.10}_{-0.11}$ with $χ^2/\mathrm{dof} = 5.2/5$ at an effective redshift $z_{\rm eff}\simeq 0.24$. This measurement is consistent with recent weak-lensing calibrations of SZ-selected clusters and supports the picture that significant mass bias corrections are required to reconcile cluster abundance measurements with primary cosmic microwave background constraints on cosmological parameters.

AI.tldr: 基于HSC-SSP第三年形状目录，对19个普朗克SZ选星系团进行弱引力透镜质量定标，测得质量偏差1-b=0.73^{+0.10}_{-0.11}，表明需要显著的质量偏差修正来调和星系团计数与原初CMB宇宙学参数约束。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru战略计划（HSC-SSP）第三年形状目录中的形状测量，对19个由普朗克卫星通过苏尼亚耶夫-泽尔多维奇（SZ）效应选出的星系团进行了弱引力透镜质量定标。我们使用与测量流程叠加方案匹配的每个星系团透镜权重，测量了叠加弱透镜信号ΔΣ(R)，并构建了包含形状噪声和投影大尺度结构贡献的解析协方差矩阵。我们对SZ质量偏差的主要约束来自一种正向建模方法，该方法在考虑普朗克SZ选择函数、SZ质量代理对数正态散射引起的爱丁顿偏差以及星系团中心偏移的情况下，对晕质量函数进行积分。通过拟合四个自由参数——对数质量偏差ln(1-b)、中心偏移比例f_mis、偏移尺度σ_off和SZ散射σ_lnM，在径向范围0.5–5.0 h⁻¹ Mpc内，我们得到1-b = 0.73⁺⁰·¹⁰₋₀·₁₁，在有效红移z_eff ≈ 0.24处χ²/自由度为5.2/5。该测量结果与近期对SZ选星系团的弱引力透镜定标一致，支持需要显著的质量偏差修正来调和星系团计数与原初宇宙微波背景（CMB）宇宙学参数约束的结论。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该测量结果与近期SZ选星团的弱引力透镜定标一致，支持需要显著的质量偏差修正来调和星系团计数与原初CMB宇宙学参数约束的结论。

title: Dust-Embedded Star Formation: Bridging Magellanic Cloud Studies of Massive Young Stellar Objects to Nearby Spiral Galaxies
comment: Accepted for publication in ApJ; 31 pages, 21 figures, 4 tables
summary: We use JWST NIRCam and MIRI imaging at 2, 4, 10, and 21 um to study young, dusty compact sources in four nearby galaxies at distances of ~ 1-5Mpc (M33, NGC300, NGC7793, and NGC5068). This work bridges well-characterized massive young stellar objects (MYSOs) in the Magellanic Clouds from the Spitzer SAGE survey to new studies of embedded clusters in more distant galaxies with JWST. Guided by the SAGE-LMC catalog, we define JWST color-magnitude selection criteria (F1000W versus F1000W-F2100W) and test them using resolution-degradation experiments. We identify 216, 32, 80 and 139 dusty young objects in the four galaxies, respectively. The selected population spans sources from systems dominated by a single MYSO to compact marginally resolved sources hosting multiple MYSOs. The color selection remains stable across 1-5 Mpc, and the 10um luminosity function retains a slope of alpha~ -2. However, blending and surface-brightness dilution remove fainter sources, leading to incompleteness of up to ~ 50% at 5.2 Mpc and biasing the sample toward brighter objects (F1000W < 19 mag). The sample spans approximate stellar masses of ~10-2 X 10^5 Mo. Spatial resolution affects the interpretation of mid-infrared emission: clustering increases the fraction of emission attributed to compact sources in active regions, while blending into diffuse emission dominates in quiescent environments. Comparisons with PAH-selected young clusters in the PHANGS galaxy NGC5068 show that our selection recovers ~ 80% of the PAH-selected sources. We show that the practical limit for studying individual MYSOs with JWST is ~3 Mpc. The resulting catalog provides a foundation for future resolved studies of star formation rates and early cluster evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST近红外和中红外成像，在4个邻近星系（距离约1-5 Mpc）中识别出数百个年轻的、尘埃丰富的致密源，建立了颜色-星等选择标准，并分析了距离、分辨率和混合效应对样本完整性的影响。研究发现，JWST研究单颗大质量年轻恒星天体的实际距离极限约为3 Mpc。
AI.motivation: 将麦哲伦云中已知的大质量年轻恒星天体（MYSOs）研究（基于Spitzer SAGE巡天）推广到更远星系中嵌入星团的JWST研究，填补两者之间的空白。
AI.method: 使用JWST NIRCam和MIRI在2、4、10和21微米四个波段成像；基于SAGE-LMC星表定义F1000W vs F1000W-F2100W颜色-星等选择标准；通过分辨率退化实验检验标准；对四个星系（M33、NGC300、NGC7793、NGC5068）进行源识别和分析。
AI.result: 在四个星系中分别识别出216、32、80和139个尘埃年轻天体；颜色选择标准在1-5 Mpc距离内保持稳定；10微米光度函数斜率约为-2；在5.2 Mpc处不完整度高达约50%；样本恒星质量范围约10-2×10^5太阳质量；与PAH选择的年轻星团有约80%的重叠。
AI.conclusion: JWST研究单颗MYSO的实际距离极限约为3 Mpc；空间分辨率影响中红外发射的解释；混合效应导致更远距离处暗弱源丢失；生成的星表为未来恒星形成率和早期星团演化的分辨率研究提供了基础。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用JWST NIRCam和MIRI在2、4、10和21微米波段的成像，研究了四个距离约1-5 Mpc的近邻星系（M33、NGC300、NGC7793和NGC5068）中的年轻、尘埃致密源。这项工作将斯皮策SAGE巡天中麦哲伦云内特征明确的大质量年轻恒星体（MYSO）与JWST对更遥远星系中嵌入星团的新研究联系起来。在SAGE-LMC星表的指导下，我们定义了JWST颜色-星等选择标准（F1000W与F1000W-F2100W），并通过分辨率退化实验进行了测试。我们在四个星系中分别识别出216、32、80和139个尘埃年轻天体。所选样本涵盖了从单个MYSO主导的系统到包含多个MYSO的紧凑、勉强可分辨的源。颜色选择在1-5 Mpc范围内保持稳定，10微米光度函数的斜率约为α~ -2。然而，混合效应和表面亮度稀释导致较暗的源丢失，在5.2 Mpc处不完整性高达约50%，并使样本偏向更亮的天体（F1000W < 19星等）。样本的恒星质量范围约为10-2×10^5太阳质量。空间分辨率影响对中红外发射的解释：在活跃区域，成团性增加了致密源发射的比例，而在宁静环境中，混合到弥漫发射中占主导。与PHANGS星系NGC5068中PAH选择的年轻星团比较显示，我们的选择恢复了约80%的PAH选择源。我们表明，利用JWST研究单个MYSO的实际极限约为3 Mpc。生成的星表为未来恒星形成率和早期星团演化的高分辨率研究奠定了基础。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：JWST研究单个MYSO的实际距离极限约为3 Mpc；空间分辨率影响中红外发射的解释；混合效应导致更远距离处暗弱源丢失；生成的星表为未来恒星形成率和早期星团演化的分辨率研究提供了基础。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST NIRCam and MIRI observed footprints overlaid on a Spitzer MIPS 24 \(\mu\) m image of each galaxy. M33, NGC 300, NGC 7793 were observed as part of GO-2130 (PI J.C. Lee), and NGC 5068 as part of the Cycle 1 PHANGS-JWST Treasury Survey (GO-2107 Lee et al. , 2023 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：JWST NIRCam和MIRI观测足迹叠加在斯皮策MIPS 24微米图像上，分别显示每个星系。M33、NGC 300、NGC 7793作为GO-2130（PI J.C. Lee）的一部分观测，NGC 5068作为第1周期PHANGS-JWST国库巡天（GO-2107 Lee et al., 2023）的一部分观测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison of JWST, HST, and Spitzer imaging for select areas of M 33, NGC 300, NGC 7793 and NGC 5068 to a provide a more detailed view of several star-forming regions in each galaxy. Spitzer MIPS 24 \(\mu\) m imaging is shown in the top panels. NIRCam 2 \(\mu\) m and MIRI 21 \(\mu\) m imaging shown in second and third row of panels respectively. The dramatic improvement in resolution and sensitivity achieved by JWST, which enables studies of massive YSOs and embedded clusters in more distant galaxies for the first time, is clear. The bottom row of panels shows the HST B-band image of the same area in each galaxy, and provides a view of the emission from young stars as well as obscuration by dust lanes and patches.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：M33、NGC 300、NGC 7793和NGC 5068选定区域的JWST、HST和斯皮策成像比较，以提供每个星系中几个恒星形成区域的更详细视图。顶部面板显示斯皮策MIPS 24微米成像。第二行和第三行面板分别显示NIRCam 2微米和MIRI 21微米成像。JWST在分辨率和灵敏度上的显著提升清晰可见，这首次使得研究更遥远星系中的大质量YSO和嵌入星团成为可能。底部面板显示每个星系同一区域的HST B波段图像，提供了年轻恒星发射以及尘埃带和斑块遮蔽的视图。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Properties of the JWST observations used in this work at 2, 4, 10, 21 \(\mu\) m. Sensitivities provided are from the Exposure Time Calculator, 5 \(\sigma\) for point sources; in practice for \(\lambda\geq\) 4.5 \(\mu\) m, compact source detection is limited by structured interstellar emission, to \(\sim\) 0.4mJy independent of distance. For M33, medium-band filters F210M and F430M were used instead of the broadband filters to mitigate against saturation from bright sources. For NGC 5068, the data are obtained as part of the PHANGS-JWST survey, which did not observe with F444W, so instead we use the filter closest in wavelength F360M.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Top Panels: Color-–magnitude diagrams of point sources from the SAGE LMC catalog projected to larger distances. The diagrams use photometry at 8 \(\mu\) m (IRAC4) and 24 \(\mu\) m (MIPS1). Objects identified as MYSOs (Whitney et al. , 2008 ; Gruendl and Chu, 2009 ) are color-coded by stellar mass derived from single-source dust radiative-transfer modeling of their spectral energy distributions. Regions occupied by main-sequence and AGB stars are indicated. The CMDs are simulated as if observed at the distances of M33 (0.8 Mpc), NGC 300 (2.0 Mpc), and NGC 7793 (3.7 Mpc) to study the effects of source blending and inform selection with increasing distance. The colors of MYSOs remain largely unchanged with increasing distance, the small fraction of MYSOs whose colors change by more than a factor of two as a result of blending are shown with triangles. The features occupied by MS and AGB stars remain distinct, and a mid-infrared color selection is expected to remain robust across the 1–5 Mpc distance range. Bottom panels: Similar color–magnitude diagrams but using 10 and 21 \(\mu\) m MIRI photometry for the galaxies studied in this work. Colors and symbols represent objects in the different categories (see Sec. IV.3 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：顶部面板：来自SAGE LMC星表的点源颜色-星等图，投影到更远距离。这些图使用8微米（IRAC4）和24微米（MIPS1）测光。被识别为MYSO（Whitney et al., 2008；Gruendl and Chu, 2009）的天体根据其光谱能量分布的单源尘埃辐射传输模型导出的恒星质量进行颜色编码。主序星和AGB星占据的区域已标出。CMD模拟为在M33（0.8 Mpc）、NGC 300（2.0 Mpc）和NGC 7793（3.7 Mpc）距离处观测，以研究源混合效应并为随距离增加的选择提供信息。MYSO的颜色随距离增加基本保持不变，因混合导致颜色变化超过两倍的一小部分MYSO用三角形表示。MS和AGB星占据的特征保持清晰，中红外颜色选择预计在1-5 Mpc距离范围内保持稳健。底部面板：类似的颜色-星等图，但使用本工作研究星系中的10和21微米MIRI测光。颜色和符号代表不同类别中的天体（见第IV.3节）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Predictions, based on Spitzer SAGE-LMC data, of the impact of source blending in JWST imaging as a function of distance on the characterization of dusty embedded star clusters. Green: fraction of clusters dominated by a single MYSO whose infrared colors change by less than 0.3 dex as the aperture size increases to simulate larger distances. In this regime the properties of individual MYSOs (e.g., masses and ages) can be reliably characterized. This fraction drops below 50% at distances of \(\sim\) 3 Mpc. Blue: clusters containing multiple MYSOs where blending does not change the infrared colors by more than 0.3 dex. These objects would still be identified as dusty star formation, but the derived properties correspond to the combined emission of multiple sources. Yellow: cases where blending causes infrared color changes greater than 0.3 dex. These will still be identified as compact dusty star formation, but again, derived physical parameters may not reliably represent only the most massive source in the group. Finally, the narrow orange wedge at the top represents sources that become too blue to be identified as dusty star forming objects from its mid-infrared colors.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：基于斯皮策SAGE-LMC数据，预测源混合在JWST成像中随距离变化对尘埃嵌入星团表征的影响。绿色：由单个MYSO主导的星团中，其红外颜色随孔径增大（模拟更大距离）变化小于0.3 dex的比例。在此范围内，可以可靠地表征单个MYSO的属性（例如质量和年龄）。该比例在约3 Mpc距离处降至50%以下。蓝色：包含多个MYSO的星团，其中混合不使红外颜色变化超过0.3 dex。这些天体仍会被识别为尘埃恒星形成，但导出的属性对应于多个源的组合发射。黄色：混合导致红外颜色变化大于0.3 dex的情况。这些仍会被识别为致密尘埃恒星形成，但导出的物理参数可能无法可靠地仅代表组中最质量大的源。最后，顶部的窄橙色楔形表示那些因中红外颜色变得过蓝而无法被识别为尘埃恒星形成天体的源。

Percentages indicate the fraction of the total number of mid-IR CMD selected sources in each galaxy (Col. 2). * Other = Evolved Stars, artifacts, or unidentified sources.

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Catalog of the 715 sources selected based on their mid-infrared colors, i.e. \(F_{2100W}/F_{1000W}>1\) for M33 and NGC 300, and \(>2\) for NGC 7793 and NGC 5068, together with a flux threshold of \(F_{1000W}>2\times 10^{-2}\) mJy. Coordinates correspond to the centroid measured in each detection band. The catalog includes photometric measurements in the four bands, concentration index values, and classification labels indicating whether each source is classified as a point-source dominated source within star-forming regions (PSD-SFR), an isolated point-source dominated source (PSD-ISO), or a compact marginally resolved source (MRCL), as well as contaminants (e.g., Stars, galaxies (Gal), and diffraction artifacts (DA)). The full catalog is available online.

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Near-IR color–magnitude diagrams for the JWST observations presented in this paper (top, for M33, NGC 300, NGC 7793, and NGC 5068), and based on SAGE-LMC (bottom, projected to distances of 0.8, 2.0, and 3.7 Mpc). These diagrams are analogous to the \(21/10\,\mu\) m (JWST) and \(24/8\,\mu\) m (Spitzer) CMDs presented earlier in Figures 3 and 8 , but the JWST CMDs are now color-coded by concentration index (CI). Purple hues correspond to compact sources with CI values typical of stars, while green and red indicate increasingly extended sources. Sources with CI values consistent with stars that lie along the main sequence or AGB branch (black borders) are excluded from our sample and further analysis. In the SAGE panels, symbols are color-coded by stellar mass derived from radiative-transfer modeling of the spectral energy distributions of the MYSOs as in Figures 3 . figures.caption_zh: 图5：本文JWST观测的近红外颜色-星等图（顶部，针对M33、NGC 300、NGC 7793和NGC 5068），以及基于SAGE-LMC的图（底部，投影到0.8、2.0和3.7 Mpc距离）。这些图类似于前面图3和图8中展示的21/10微米（JWST）和24/8微米（斯皮策）CMD，但JWST CMD现在按浓度指数（CI）进行颜色编码。紫色色调对应CI值典型于恒星的致密源，而绿色和红色表示越来越延展的源。CI值与恒星一致且位于主序或AGB分支（黑色边框）上的源被排除在我们的样本和进一步分析之外。在SAGE面板中，符号根据MYSO光谱能量分布的辐射传输模型导出的恒星质量进行颜色编码，如图3所示。三角形表示因混合导致颜色变化超过两倍的MYSO。

title: Exploring the Relationship Between Bars, Star Formation Activity, and Host Galaxy Properties from $\mathbf{z \sim 0}$ to $\mathbf{z \sim 2}$
summary: We present the most comprehensive study to date of the relationship between bars, star formation, and galaxy properties from $z \sim$ 0 to $z \sim$ 2. We use a mass-complete sample of 1,171 galaxies from the JWST CEERS survey with $M_\star > 10^{10} M_\odot$ and repeat the analysis using COSMOS-Web data. Our results are: 1) At high redshift ($z \sim$ $1-2$) barred galaxies tend to have high sSFRs and low Sérsic indices ($n \leq 2$), while at low redshifts barred galaxies emerge with both low sSFR and higher $n$, suggestive of quiescent galaxies with bulges. 2) The fractional contribution of barred quiescent galaxies to the bar fraction rises steeply from $z \sim$ 2 to $z \sim$ 0, while that of barred actively star-forming galaxies falls. 3) The fraction of quiescent galaxies that are barred rises steeply over the last 10 Gyr. 4) Our empirical results show good agreement with the TNG50-1 simulations for bars with $a_{\mathrm{bar}}$ $>$ 1.5 kpc. Our results allow for the possibility that bar-driven secular evolution may lead to quiescence and/or that bars are more likely to persist and grow in gas-poor, quiescent galaxies. The steep rise in the quiescent bar fraction over 10 Gyr may represent an evolutionary sequence whereby gas-rich disks at high redshift first develop short, dynamically young bars and over time, repeated bar-driven gas inflows lead to central starbursts and declining gas fractions that strengthen the bar as the galaxy transitions toward quiescence.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST CEERS巡天数据，对z~0至z~2范围内1171个大质量星系(M*>10^10 M⊙)中棒状结构、恒星形成与星系性质之间的关系进行了迄今最全面的研究。研究发现：高红移(z~1-2)下棒状星系倾向于高比恒星形成率和低Sérsic指数；低红移下棒状星系则呈现低恒星形成和高Sérsic指数。棒状宁静星系的占比从z~2到z~0急剧上升，而棒状恒星形成星系占比下降。结果与TNG50-1模拟吻合，支持棒驱动演化导致星系变宁静的假说。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对棒状星系的演化及其与恒星形成活动、星系形态转变的关系仍不清晰，尤其是高红移(>1)下缺失系统性的大样本观测研究。作者希望利用JWST的高分辨率和深度观测，建立从高红移到低红移的连续演化图像，揭示棒如何影响星系的星暴、宁静化等关键演化过程。
AI.method: 1）使用JWST CEERS巡天中质量完备的1171个星系样本(M*>10^10 M⊙)，并重复用COSMOS-Web数据验证；2）对比高红移(z~1-2)与低红移(z<1)的星系棒结构参数；3）计算sSFR（比恒星形成率）、Sérsic指数和棒分数；4）与TNG50-1流体动力学模拟结果进行对比验证。
AI.result: 1）高红移棒状星系主要位于恒星形成主序上，sSFR高且Sérsic指数低(n≤2)；低红移棒状星系具有低sSFR和高Sérsic指数（带核球）；2）棒状宁静星系在总棒分数中的占比从z~2到z~0急剧上升，而棒状恒星形成星系占比持续下降；3）宁静星系中出现棒的分数在过去100亿年内急剧增加；4）经验结果与TNG50-1模拟中bar>1.5kpc的星系吻合良好。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持两种可能机制：一是棒驱动的长期演化（棒→气体流入→核爆→气体耗尽→宁静化）导致星系趋于宁静；二是气体贫乏的宁静星系更有利于棒的持续存在和增长。高红移富气盘先形成短、动力学年轻的棒，随时间内向气体涌入触发星暴并降低气体分数，当星系向宁静转变时棒被加强，形成了长达100亿年的演化序列。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了迄今为止从z~0到z~2最全面的关于棒、恒星形成与星系属性之间关系的研究。我们使用了JWST CEERS巡天中一个质量完备的样本，包含1171个M_星>10^10 M_⊙的星系，并利用COSMOS-Web数据重复了分析。我们的结果如下：1) 在高红移（z~1-2）下，有棒星系倾向于具有高比恒星形成率（sSFR）和低塞西克指数（n≤2），而在低红移下，有棒星系同时出现在低sSFR和较高n值的情况下，暗示存在具有核球的宁静星系。2) 有棒宁静星系在棒星系比例中的贡献从z~2到z~0急剧上升，而有棒活跃恒星形成星系的贡献则下降。3) 宁静星系中有棒星系的比例在过去100亿年间急剧上升。4) 我们的经验结果与TNG50-1模拟中a_棒>1.5 kpc的棒星系吻合良好。我们的结果支持两种可能性：棒驱动的长期演化可能导致星系宁静，和/或棒更可能在气体贫乏的宁静星系中持续存在并增长。宁静星系棒比例在100亿年间的急剧上升可能代表一个演化序列：高红移富气盘首先形成短而动力学年轻的棒，随着时间的推移，反复的棒驱动气体流入导致中心星暴和气体比例下降，从而在星系向宁静转变时加强棒。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: （基于可用摘要翻译）结果支持两种可能机制：一是棒驱动的长期演化（棒→气体流入→核爆→气体耗尽→宁静化）导致星系趋于宁静；二是气体贫乏的宁静星系更有利于棒的持续存在和增长。高红移富气盘先形成短、动力学年轻的棒，随时间内向气体涌入触发星暴并降低气体分数，当星系向宁静转变时棒被加强，形成了长达100亿年的演化序列。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Distribution of Sérsic indices ( \(n\) ) for visually identified disk galaxies. The distributions peak at \(n\leq 2\) , consistent with shallow light profiles expected of disk-dominated galaxies. The black dashed lines mark the median \(n\) of the galaxy population in each redshift bin. The red dashed lines mark the 25th and 75th percentiles of the distribution in each bin, illustrating the interquartile range of the sample. The concentration of low- \(n\) systems confirms that our visual classifications predominantly select structurally disk-dominated galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：视觉识别盘星系塞西克指数（n）的分布。分布峰值在n≤2处，与盘主导星系预期的浅光轮廓一致。黑色虚线标记每个红移区间星系样本的中位n值。红色虚线标记每个区间分布的25%和75%分位数，显示样本的四分位距。低n系统的集中证实了我们的视觉分类主要选择了结构上盘主导的星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : We define quiescent galaxies across all redshift bins as galaxies with sSFRs below 10 -11 yr -1 . This figure shows unbarred disk galaxies in green and barred disk galaxies in magenta, with the constant sSFR cut for quiescent galaxies shown as a dashed line labeled sSFR \(=\) 10 -11 yr -1 . We also define actively star-forming galaxies as those with sSFRs above 10 -10 yr -1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们将所有红移区间内sSFR低于10^-11 yr^-1的星系定义为宁静星系。本图以绿色显示无棒盘星系，以品红色显示有棒盘星系，宁静星系的恒定sSFR切割以虚线标出，标记为sSFR = 10^-11 yr^-1。我们还将sSFR高于10^-10 yr^-1的星系定义为活跃恒星形成星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : We define quiescent galaxies as below the main sequence -1 dex. This figure shows unbarred disk galaxies in green, barred disk galaxies in magenta, and galaxies above our stellar mass cut that do not fall within those definitions in grey (e.g., spheroids, highly inclined disks, etc.). The main sequence parameterization presented in Equation 10 and Table 2 of Popesso et al. ( 2023 ) is shown as the solid black line and this main sequence -1 dex is shown as the dashed black line.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：我们将低于主序-1 dex的星系定义为宁静星系。本图以绿色显示无棒盘星系，以品红色显示有棒盘星系，以灰色显示高于我们恒星质量切割但不符合这些定义的星系（例如，球状体、高倾角盘等）。Popesso等人（2023）方程10和表2中给出的主序参数化以实黑线显示，主序-1 dex以虚黑线显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Selection of quiescent barred galaxies from the sSFR method (see Section III.4 ). Quiescent disks exhibit smoother morphologies, redder colors, and little evidence of ongoing SF. The RGB images were constructed using JWST NIRCam filters, with F115W mapped to the blue channel, F200W to green, and F444W to red.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：通过sSFR方法选择宁静有棒星系（见第III.4节）。宁静盘星系表现出更平滑的形态、更红的颜色，且几乎没有正在进行的恒星形成证据。RGB图像使用JWST NIRCam滤光片构建，F115W映射到蓝色通道，F200W映射到绿色，F444W映射到红色。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Selection of actively star-forming barred galaxies from the sSFR method (see Section III.5 ). Actively star-forming disks exhibit clumpier morphologies, bluer colors, and evidence of ongoing SF. As in Figure 4 , the RGB images were constructed using JWST NIRCam filters, with F115W mapped to the blue channel, F200W to green, and F444W to red.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：通过sSFR方法选择活跃恒星形成有棒星系（见第III.5节）。活跃恒星形成盘星系表现出更块状的形态、更蓝的颜色，以及正在进行的恒星形成证据。与图4一样，RGB图像使用JWST NIRCam滤光片构建，F115W映射到蓝色通道，F200W映射到绿色，F444W映射到红色。

The dashed line marks \(\log\,{sSFR}=-11~{yr}^{-1}\) . Barred galaxies evolve toward lower sSFR in the stellar mass-SFR plane. Bottom : \(\log\,{sSFR}\) versus log Sérsic index. figures.caption_zh: 图6：CEERS中盘星系在三个红移区间内的分布：0.5≤z<1.0、1.0≤z<1.5和1.5≤z≤2.0（从左到右）。有棒和无棒星系分别以粉色和绿色点显示。上图：log SFR与log恒星质量。虚线标记log sSFR = -11 yr^-1。有棒星系在恒星质量-SFR平面中向较低sSFR演化。下图：log sSFR与log塞西克指数。n=2（log n≈0.3）处的垂直虚线区分盘主导和核球主导的形态。在高红移（1.5≤z<2和1.0≤z<1.5）下，有棒星系宿主主要具有n≤2（log(n)≤0.3），对应于没有充分发育核球的盘主导星系。然而，在最低红移区间（0.5≤z<1.0）中，我们看到同时具有较高n（>2）和低sSFR的有棒星系宿主出现。
